channel.title: Findich
channel.description: Updates for Findich, an Immich drive for the macOS Finder.

item.title: Findich 1.3.0
item.description:
• 53996a5 fix: address PR review feedback
  • e6f4f62 docs: add Homebrew install instructions
  • a7662d4 docs: Options tab, chunking strategies, free up space, cleartext note
  • db774e1 chore(project): plain-HTTP support, build settings, ignore scratch dir
  • 4c7d2d4 feat(app): Options tab with a Finder-style tab strip
  • f768edc feat(app): free up space by evicting downloaded originals
  • 4822d02 feat: chunked and date-grouped folder enumeration
  • 4335b5c feat(chunking): page-size settings and pure date-grouping layout
  • e6c0680 chore(site): publish vN+1

item.title: Findich 1.2.3
item.description:
• eed1637 fix(app): keep the API key accessible after first unlock for the background extension
  • 24302a0 docs: add a release smoke-test checklist to the README
  • 6d2417c chore(site): publish vN+1

item.title: Findich 1.2.2
item.description:
• ac1861e fix(app): use the data-protection keychain so updates stop re-prompting for the API key
  • b9c23d8 test(release): add appcast-generator tests and harden the release tooling
  • 46bbc4e fix(release): build the appcast with string templating, not an XML parser

item.title: Findich 1.2.1
item.description: - 971db82 fix(release): make the GitHub Release step idempotent and guard sign_update - aedffb9 chore(site): publish v1.2.0 in the Sparkle appcast

item.title: Findich 1.2.0
item.description: - 20f9b26 feat(app): add Sparkle auto-update with a signed GitHub-Releases appcast - ff53ec3 feat(site): serve the Sparkle appcast feed at /appcast.xml - bef5a3c fix(build): stamp the real version into the app and extension Info.plist - 19b4018 docs: list the exact Immich API key permissions Findich needs - 6b3263c docs: add a security policy and a Gumroad funding link - ce245fc fix(build): exclude markdown from Xcode target sources - 0a5b5f6 docs(test): add diagnostic and testing documentation - fbc6d91 docs(app): document architecture and shared contracts - a0f8e7f chores: tidy-up repo from development garbage and start with clean state - 8017293 Findich: an Immich drive for the macOS Finder
